Container.Name: media-optimizer
Container.Overview:
Analyse your Sonarr and Radarr libraries to find space wasters, codec upgrade candidates, and optimisation opportunities.
Features: - Connect to Sonarr and Radarr using their API keys - View total library size, average file sizes, and quality breakdown - Sort by size, MB/minute, codec, resolution, and year - Identify large files with inefficient codecs (h264 vs HEVC) - Export data as CSV or JSON for further analysis - API keys stay in your browser — never sent to external servers
Enter your Sonarr/Radarr URL and API key directly in the web UI to get started.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work, please consider a donation!
Container.Description: Analyze your Sonarr and Radarr libraries to identify space hogs and codec upgrade candidates.
